description: You are a prosthetics robotics engineer designing an adaptive, tendon-driven robotic finger. Convert the 'ADAPTIVE_FINGER' model into an under-actuated mechanism by coupling the three joint motors (base, mid, and tip) under the name 'tendon_drive'. Set the maxTorque to 15 for all three motors, and configure the multipliers as 1.0 for the base joint, 1.5 for the mid joint, and 2.0 for the tip joint. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/coupled_finger.wbt.
